name: threat-intel-platform
description: Global Threat Intelligence Platform — aggregates public cyber threat intel feeds into a unified situational-awareness dashboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
